en.extract:
Reichenbach's sunbird (Anabathmis reichenbachii) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae.
It is native to the African tropical rainforest.
The bird is named after the German botanist and zoologist Heinrich Ludwig Reichenbach.

External links

'''Reichenbach's sunbird''' ('''''Anabathmis reichenbachii''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Nectariniidae]].
It is native to the [[Tropical rainforest|African tropical rainforest]].

The bird is named after the German botanist and zoologist [[Ludwig Reichenbach|Heinrich Ludwig Reichenbach]].<ref>{{cite book|last=Beolens|first=Bo|title=Whose Bird? Men and Women Commemorated in the Common Names of Birds|year=2003|publisher=Christopher Helm|location=London|page=282|author2=Watkins, Michael }}</ref>
